tools.description: Generate a 2D DXF artifact from text spec or params.
tools.handler_signature: cad_dxf_generate(spec_text: 'str' = '', params: 'Optional[Mapping[str, Any]]' = None, output_path: 'str' = 'outputs/generated_shape.dxf', units: 'str' = 'mm', layer: 'str' = 'OUTLINE') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Generate a 3D STEP artifact from text spec or params (optional cadquery).
tools.handler_signature: cad_step_generate(spec_text: 'str' = '', params: 'Optional[Mapping[str, Any]]' = None, output_path: 'str' = 'outputs/generated_part.step') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Generate a conical helix (XY projection) and export DXF to outputs/
tools.handler_signature: conical_generate_helix(turns: 'Optional[float]' = None, pitch: 'Optional[float]' = None, r_bottom: 'Optional[float]' = None, r_top: 'Optional[float]' = None, height: 'Optional[float]' = None, segments_per_turn: 'Optional[int]' = None, out_dxf: 'str' = 'outputs/conical_helix_xy.dxf', layer: 'str' = 'CONICAL_HELIX') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Rule-based chat assistant for Nova Hub
tools.handler_signature: conversation_chat(user_message: 'str', project_path: 'str', session_id: 'str' = 'default', write_reports: 'bool' = True) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: DeepSeek chat.completions (approval)
tools.handler_signature: deepseek_chat(prompt: 'str', system: 'Optional[str]' = None, temperature: 'Optional[float]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Open Chrome to an allowlisted URL (https only)
tools.handler_signature: desktop_open_chrome(url: 'str') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Open Explorer for a workspace folder (allowlisted)
tools.handler_signature: desktop_open_folder(path: 'str') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Open VS Code in a folder (allowlisted)
tools.handler_signature: desktop_open_vscode(path: 'str') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: List directory entries
tools.handler_signature: fs_list_dir(path: 'str' = '.') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Read a text file safely (binary guarded)
tools.handler_signature: fs_read_text(path: 'str', max_bytes: 'int' = 200000) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Write a text file (approval guarded; prefer outputs/)
tools.handler_signature: fs_write(path: 'str', text: 'str', target: 'str | None' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Gemini generateContent (approval)
tools.handler_signature: gemini_prompt(text: 'str', system: 'Optional[str]' = None, temperature: 'Optional[float]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Git commit (approval + allow_commit=true)
tools.handler_signature: git_commit(message: 'str', repo_path: 'Optional[str]' = None, all: 'bool' = False) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Git diff
tools.handler_signature: git_diff(repo_path: 'Optional[str]' = None, args: 'Optional[list[str]]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Git status
tools.handler_signature: git_status(repo_path: 'Optional[str]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Generate radial halftone (circles) and export DXF to outputs/
tools.handler_signature: halftone_generate_pattern(out_dxf: 'str' = 'outputs/halftone_gradient.dxf') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Greedy shelf pack rectangles and export DXF to outputs/
tools.handler_signature: nesting_solve_rectangles(rects: 'List[List[float]]', out_dxf: 'str' = 'outputs/nesting_result.dxf') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Ollama local chat (model=llama3)
tools.handler_signature: ollama_chat(prompt: 'str', system: 'Optional[str]' = None, images: 'Optional[List[str]]' = None, temperature: 'Optional[float]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: OpenAI chat.completions (approval)
tools.handler_signature: openai_chat(prompt: 'str', system: 'Optional[str]' = None, temperature: 'Optional[float]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Apply a unified diff file with backups (approval required)
tools.handler_signature: patch_apply(diff_path: 'str', target_root: 'str' = '.', create_backup: 'bool' = True, backup_suffix: 'str' = '.bak', write_reports: 'bool' = True) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Plan safe patches and generate unified diffs
tools.handler_signature: patch_plan(target_root: 'str' = '.', goal: 'str' = '', constraints: 'Optional[str]' = None, max_files: 'int' = 10, write_reports: 'bool' = True) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Run scan->search->plan->(apply)->verify pipeline
tools.handler_signature: pipeline_run(target_root: 'str' = '.', goal: 'str' = '', apply_diff: 'bool' = False, max_files: 'int' = 10, write_reports: 'bool' = True) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Scan repository tree and write reports
tools.handler_signature: project_scan(root_path: 'str' = '.', include_globs: 'Optional[List[str]]' = None, exclude_globs: 'Optional[List[str]]' = None, write_reports: 'bool' = True) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Search repository for TODOs, risks, and hotspots
tools.handler_signature: repo_search(root_path: 'str' = '.', query: 'Optional[str]' = None, regex: 'bool' = False, extensions: 'Optional[List[str]]' = None, max_matches: 'int' = 500, write_reports: 'bool' = True) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Run a preview copy of the project (approval required)
tools.handler_signature: run_preview(project_id: 'str', profile_id: 'str') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Stop a running preview process
tools.handler_signature: run_stop(run_id: 'str') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Run security audit (read-only; report writing may require approval)
tools.handler_signature: security_audit(project_id: 'str' = '', write_reports: 'bool' = True) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Apply sketch ops to sketch.json
tools.handler_signature: sketch_apply(project_id: 'str', ops: 'List[Dict[str, Any]]') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Export sketch to DXF
tools.handler_signature: sketch_export_dxf(project_id: 'str', output_path: 'str' = '') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Parse sketch description into operations
tools.handler_signature: sketch_parse(text: 'str') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Generate image using local Stable Diffusion with Hires.fix support
tools.handler_signature: generate_image(prompt: 'str', negative_prompt: 'str' = '', width: 'int' = 512, height: 'int' = 512, steps: 'int' = 20, cfg_scale: 'float' = 7.0, enable_hr: 'bool' = False, hr_scale: 'float' = 2.0, hr_upscaler: 'str' = 'Latent', denoising_strength: 'float' = 0.7, model_name: 'Optional[str]' = None, output_dir: 'Optional[str]' = None, target: 'Optional[str]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Upscale existing image using Stable Diffusion extras
tools.handler_signature: upscale_image(image_path: 'str', upscaling_resize: 'float' = 2.0, upscaler_1: 'str' = 'R-ESRGAN 4x+', output_dir: 'Optional[str]' = None, target: 'Optional[str]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Send Telegram message (approval)
tools.handler_signature: telegram_send(text: 'str', chat_id: 'Optional[str]' = None, parse_mode: 'Optional[str]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Run smoke checks (compileall, tool list, optional audit)
tools.handler_signature: verify_smoke(target_root: 'str' = '.', run_compileall: 'bool' = True, run_tool_list: 'bool' = True, run_optional_audit: 'bool' = False, write_reports: 'bool' = True) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Record audio (optional STT) into workspace
tools.handler_signature: voice_stt_record(project_id: 'str', seconds: 'int' = 4) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'

tools.description: Speak text using offline TTS if available
tools.handler_signature: voice_tts_speak(text: 'str') -> 'Dict[str, Any]'
